criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance productivity features.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, user reviews, expert analyses.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, usability studies, expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app to improve productivity.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, feature comparisons, expert analyses.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: The ability of the app to integrate with other tools and platforms.
criteria.sources: Product documentation, integration lists, user reviews.

criteria.name: Cost-Effectiveness
criteria.description: The value provided by the app relative to its cost.
criteria.sources: Pricing information, user reviews, cost-benefit analyses.
